requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输与危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸與危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium-ion cells and batteries shipped to Switzerland generally need UN Manual of Tests and Criteria Part III subsection 38.3 evidence and the related test summary before air, sea, road, or multimodal transport. Switzerland transport compliance is separate from product conformity and project approval documents.
summary.zh: 运往瑞士的锂离子电芯和电池通常需要UN测试与分类手册第三篇第38.3小节的运输测试证据及相关测试摘要后方可进行航空、海运、公路或多式联运。瑞士运输合规与产品符合性、项目批准文件独立。
summary.zht: 運往瑞士的鋰離子電芯和電池通常需要UN測試與分類手冊第三篇第38.3小節的運輸測試證據及相關測試摘要後方可進行航空、海運、公路或多式聯運。瑞士運輸合規與產品符合性、項目批准文件獨立。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3

summary.en: China exporters commonly hold UN 38.3 reports and transport-condition summaries for lithium-battery exports. These reports support shipment planning but must be mapped to Switzerland route, model, chemistry, packaging, and carrier route requirements.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常持有中国锂电出口的UN 38.3报告和运输条件摘要。这些报告可支持运输规划，但必须按瑞士目的地、型号、化学体系、包装和承运路线要求进行匹配。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常持有中國鋰電出口的UN 38.3報告和運輸條件摘要。這些報告可支持運輸規劃，但必須按瑞士目的地、型號、化學體系、包裝和承運路線要求進行匹配。

gap.en: A BESS transport file is not a substitute for Switzerland customs or project clearance. Exporters should prepare model-specific UN 38.3 reports, test summaries, SDS, packing instructions, state-of-charge controls, packaging and charging limits, and carrier-required declarations for the selected route.
gap.zh: 运输文件不能替代瑞士海关或项目清关。出口商应为目标路线准备型号对应的UN 38.3报告、测试摘要、SDS、包装说明、荷电状态控制、包装与充电限制、承运人要求申报。
gap.zht: 運輸文件不能替代瑞士海關或項目清關。出口商應為目標路線準備型號對應的UN 38.3報告、測試摘要、SDS、包裝說明、荷電狀態控制、包裝與充電限制、承運人要求申報。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where dangerous-goods and transport rules apply for the selected mode and model. Not a substitute for Swiss market-access approvals.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China and international dangerous-goods transport; does not replace Swiss product, grid, or market approvals.

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a Swiss-entry shipment gate, not a Swiss interconnection or conformity gate. Match model and route conditions to shipment documentation and dangerous-goods rules.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是入瑞士运输门槛，而非瑞士并网或合规门槛。应将型号与路线条件与运输文件和危险货物规则逐项匹配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是入瑞士運輸門檻，而非瑞士併網或符合性門檻。應將型號與路線條件與運輸文件和危險貨物規則逐項匹配。
